chapter_title: Department of the California Highway Patrol
text: Wherever in any statute “California Highway Patrol” is used, it means the Department of the California Highway Patrol.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 2. Department of the California Highway Patrol [2100 - 2482]
#### Article 1. Administration [2100 - 2114]
##### § 2102

Wherever in any statute “California Highway Patrol” is used, it means the Department of the California Highway Patrol.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: Wherever in any statute “California Highway Patrol” is used, it means the Department of the California Highway Patrol.
